$comment: ODIN reads ONLY this file at startup. It is intentionally tiny so it is never skipped. Full skill prompts + scripts are loaded lazily by each subagent when dispatched. Before any Plugin API call, a subagent MUST verify its listed scripts were actually read (self-check gate).

modi.loadWhen: wireframe has placeholder shapes OR instance migration requested

vali.loadWhen: layout/structure needs to be coded (before MIMR)

mimr.role: Token audit + bulk write (TS + native variables)
mimr.loadWhen: tokens changed or needed (after VALI if both)

saga.loadWhen: component output needed (last; depends on MIMR+VALI)

librarian.role: Owns the large external Token Studio JSON + KB .md repos; narrow query interface only
librarian.loadWhen: a token/value is missing from token-registry.md OR KB lookup needed

sync.stalenessCheck: git ls-remote <repo> <branch>; re-pull only if SHA differs

handoffContracts.vali->mimr: node list [{id,type}] forwarded as PRIOR_SCAN (skips MIMR tree walk)
handoffContracts.mimr->saga: NV map {prop: shortName, value} reused for --fds-* CSS vars (no re-resolution)
handoffContracts.modi->vali: swap report; converted instances ready for layout pass
